
### cookie fields  {.smaller}


* cookie data: whatever server wants; typically <em>session ID</em> 
   * usually tied to database on server
   * supposed to be kept secret by logged-in user

* <code>domain</code>: to what servers should browser send the cookie 

   * <code style="border: 2px solid black">facebook.com</code> --- login.facebook.com, www.facebook.com, facebook.com, etc.

* [<code>path</code>: to what URLs on a server should browser send the cookie]{.fragment fragment-index=2 .custom .myem-only} 

   * <code style="border: 2px solid black">/foo</code> --- server.com/foo, server.com/foo/bar, etc.

* <code>expires</code>: when the browser should forget the cookie
* and security related:  

   * secure; samesite; httponly; partitioned;
